commit_scope: Add a guided Demo MVP product page and navigation entry points so users can execute a clear 5-minute idea->progress->flow->tasks walkthrough.

phase_gate.blocked_reason: Awaiting push, PR checks, and merge.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Users can open /demo and follow a human-readable, step-by-step Demo MVP path with live snapshot metrics and direct links to core flow pages.
test_flows: Open /demo and confirm links for choose idea, update progress, verify flow, and review tasks are present.
Confirm top navigation includes Demo on desktop/mobile menu.
Confirm home page exposes a Run MVP Demo CTA and Start Exploring includes MVP demo path.
